home.heroSubtitle: I-kraal yaseZulu ephilayo – zama ifa, ubunye kanye nenjabulo
home.introText: Ngena e-kraal lethu. Funda ukushona amachwe negogo, jika namabutho, lalela izindaba eduze komlilo, unamaselo okwamukela kwesintu samaZulu.

culturalTour.title: Amahambo Amasiko AmaZulu
culturalTour.desc: Hlangana nomlando wamaSiko amaZulu ngokushona amachwe, ukujika, ukwenza izikhali, nokupheka kwesintu — konke kunohambo olulodwa olujulile.

ceremonies.title: Imicimbi Yesikhathi Nemishado
ceremonies.desc: Gcinwa uthando nokuphila ngezinkambiso zesiZulu, umculo, nokujika.

accommodation.title: Iindlu Zesintu ZesiZulu
accommodation.desc: Lala ebusuku endlini yesintu yamaZulu uvuke uphila impilo yomphakathi.

ourStory.heroSubtitle: Uhambo olugxilwe esikhundleni sesiZulu, umphakathi, kanye nonqangi.
ourStory.myStoryP1: Angikwazi ukuthi ngiyindoda ephelele, kodwa ngizama ukuphila ngezimilo ezinhle. Igama lami ngu-Mzamo, futhi ngiyisakhamuzi esikhuthele sendawo yase-Ngonyamaneni eHluhluwe, ngaphansi kweNkosi uMdletshe.
ourStory.myStoryP2: Ngidale isigodi sami ngoba ngithanda amasiko ami futhi ngifuna ukugcina izikhomba zethu zesizukulwane esizayo. Okwaqala njengomfutho kukhule kwaba yinhlangano yomphakathi abantu abayazisa futhi beyisekele. Namuhla isiba ibhizinisi, kodwa ngaphakathi kuhlala kuyindlela yokusiza umphakathi wami nokugcina ifa lethu liphila.
ourStory.thankYou: Uma ngithi 'Ngiyabonga', ngisho siyabonga — ukubonga okuvela enhliziyweni.
ourStory.livingKraalP: I-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead akusilo imiuziyamu — i-kraal yamaZulu ephilayo. Lapha, amasiko awaboniswa ngeglasi kodwa ayabelwana ngokuhlangenwe nakho. Kusukela ekushoneni amachwe nasekujikeni kuya ezindabeni ezilandiswa ngomlilo, isikhathi ngasinye sinxusa ukungena empilweni yangempela yesiZulu.
ourStory.missionP: Sihlose ukugcina nokugubha ifa lamaZulu ngokuvula ikhaya lethu izivakashi emhlabeni wonke. Inhloso yethu ukukhuthaza ubunye, injabulo, nokuzwana ngokushintshanisa amasiko.
ourStory.communityP: Yonke into ehlangenwe nayo e-Mzamo Village iholwa amalungu omphakathi — amadlozi, amabutho, nezingcweti — iqinisekisa ukuthi ifa liyenziwa ngeqiniso nokuhlonipha.

tour.title: Amahambo Amasiko AmaZulu
tour.desc: Hlangana nomlando wamaSiko amaZulu ngokushona amachwe, ukujika, ukwenza izikhali, nokupheka kwesintu — konke kunohambo olulodwa olujulile.

craftsmanship.title: Kwenziwe Ngezandla Umphakathi Wethu
craftsmanship.desc: Yonke into yobuciko, ichwe, nokubaziwe esitolo sethu kwenziwa ngezandla nguMzamo nezakhamuzi zaseMzamo Village — ubuciko bangempela obusekela umphakathi wethu ngokuqondile.

beadwork.title: Ukushona Amachwe noGogo
beadwork.desc: Funda izinhlelo zamaZulu zamachwe wenza isibopho sakho.

cooking.title: Ukupheka Kwesintu
cooking.desc: Pheka izindlela zesiZulu ngomlilo nevulandlela yomphakathi.

extra.title: Okunye Okokuzijabulisa
extra.subtitle: Okuzongezelela okukhethekile okutholakala ngokwehlukene — akufakiwe ohambweni oluyinhloko lwamasiko isiZulu.

workshops.title: Amaklasi Ezikole
workshops.desc: Imfundo yamasiko ethakazelisayo yamaqembu ezikole nabafundi.

homesteadStay.title: Ukuhlala Ekhaya
homesteadStay.desc: Chitha isikhathi uhlala nesigodi njengengxenye yempilo yansuku zonke ekhaya.

hutStay.title: Ukulala Endlini Yesintu YesiZulu
hutStay.desc: Lala ebusuku endlini yesintu yesiZulu yangempela.

events.intro: Imishado yesikhathi, amaklasi ezikole, izindaba zobusuku, nokunye. Xhumana nathi ukubhuka umcimbi wakho ozimele.

weddings.title: Imishado Yesikhathi
weddings.desc: Gcinwa uthando ngendlela yesintu samaZulu ngomculo, ukujika, nezinkambiso.

workshops.title: Amaklasi Ezikole
workshops.desc: Izifundo zamasiko ezithakazelisayo zamafundi — amachwe, ukujika, nezindaba.

storytelling.title: Izindaba Zobusuku
storytelling.desc: Buthelanani eduze komlilo uzwe izindaba zamandulo ezidale isizukulwane ngesizukulwane.

ceremonies.title: Izinqubo Ezizimele
ceremonies.desc: Bhuka imicimbi ekhethekile ehambisana neqembu lenu noma umcimbi.

shop.intro: Izinto zesintu zamaZulu nezingubo — ezenziwa ngesandla nefa.

contact.intro: Xhumana nathi ukubhuka, ukubuza imibuzo, noma ukuhlela umcimbi owodwa.
contact.formComingSoon: Ifomu lokuxhumana lizofika maduze. Ngalesi sikhathi, sicela uye kuWhatsApp noma ucingo.

footer.title: Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead
footer.copyRight: © {year} I-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead. Wonke amalungelo agciniwe.

seo.siteTitleDefault: Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead — Okokuzijabulisa Kwesiko LamaZulu eHluhluwe
seo.siteDescriptionDefault: Ohambo lwamasiko amaZulu ngempela, ukwenziwa kwezintebe, umdanso, ukupheka kwendabuko kanye nokuhlala ezindlini zesintu e-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal, eduze kweHluhluwe-iMfolozi.

ourStory.title: Mayelana Nathi — Umuzi Wamasiko AmaZulu eHluhluwe
ourStory.description: Hlangana noMzamo uthole indaba engemuva kwe-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead — ikhaya lamaZulu eliphilayo eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal, elisekelwe emphakathini nasesikweni.

experiences.title: Okokuzijabulisa — Isiko LamaZulu, Ukulandisa Nobuciko
experiences.description: Thola okokuzijabulisa kwamasiko amaZulu e-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead: izifundo zezikole, ukuhlala ekhaya, ukulala endlini yesintu kanye namasiko endabuko eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.

gallery.title: Izithombe
gallery.description: Buka izithombe ze-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead — ikhaya, izindlu zesintu kanye nempilo yansuku zonke yomuzi wamasiko amaZulu eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.

events.title: Imicimbi Namasiko
events.description: Gubha imishado, izifundo, ubusuku bokulandisa kanye namasiko endabuko amaZulu e-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.

shop.title: Isitolo — Ubuciko Nezintebe ZamaZulu Ezenziwe Ngesandla
shop.description: Buka izintebe zamaZulu ezenziwe ngesandla, ubuciko bokubaza kanye nezinto zendabuko ezenziwa umphakathi we-Mzamo Village eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.

faq.title: Imibuzo Ejwayelekile
faq.description: Izimpendulo zemibuzo ejwayelekile mayelana nokuvakashela, ukubhuka, nokuhlala e-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead, umuzi wamasiko amaZulu eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.

contact.title: Bhuka / Buza
contact.description: Bhuka noma ubuze mayelana nokuvakashela i-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead eHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal. Xhumana nge-WhatsApp, ucingo, ne-imeyili ohambweni lwamasiko nasekubhukeni kwamaqembu.

items.a: I-isiZulu Cultural Tours eyinhloko ifaka imisebenzi emine: ukwenziwa kwezintebe noGogo, umdanso nomculo wamaZulu, ukubaza imikhonto namahawu, kanye nokupheka kwendabuko — konke kuhambo olulodwa olujulile.

items.q: Izifundo zezikole, ukuhlala ekhaya, ukulala endlini yesintu, noma amasiko kuyafakwa ohambweni?
items.a: Cha — lokhu kungamathuba ahlukene anikezwa ngaphandle kwe-isiZulu Cultural Tours eyinhloko, akuyona ingxenye yayo. Ngamunye ungabhukwa wodwa noma kanye nohambo oluyinhloko. Sicela usitshele lokho okuthakazelela lapho ubuza ukuze sikwazi ukuhlelela ukuvakasha okufanele.

items.q: I-Mzamo's Cultural Village & Homestead itholakala kuphi?
items.a: Sisendaweni yaseHluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal, eNingizimu Afrika, eduze nendawo yaseHluhluwe-iMfolozi Memorial Gate.

items.q: Ngibhuka kanjani ukuvakasha noma uhambo lweqembu?
items.a: Indlela esheshayo ukusebenzisa i-WhatsApp ku-+27 66 584 5674. Ukubhukwa kwenziwa ngokuqondile ngaphandle kwezimali zenkundla — sitshele nje ukuthi ufuna uhambo oluyinhloko lwamasiko, elinye lamathuba angeziwe, noma inhlanganisela yakho konke.
Yebo — ukulala endlini yesintu yesiZulu kutholakala njengethuba elihlukile kanye nohambo oluyinhloko.
Yebo, izifundo zezikole zinikezwa njengethuba elihlukile, ezethula abafundi esikweni lamaZulu, ubuciko, kanye namasiko ngendlela yokwenza ngokoqobo.
Yebo — yonke into yenziwa ngesandla umphakathi we-Mzamo Village usebenzisa amasu endabuko adluliselwa isizukulwane ngesizukulwane.
